metadata.description: EstreGenesis self-hosted Claude Code plugin marketplace. Ships five Phase 2 production-ready plugins: Constellation (live multi-agent orchestration with WS server + A2A messaging + dashboard + MCP server with 5 tools — v0.3.10 / Constellation v2.4.10 PR system §13.22 distill (RRP→정식 스펙: two-level PR + 5 wire vocab + topology + approval + state machine) + deadlock 서버 detector opt-in (§13.19.10 Q3, WS_DEADLOCK_DETECT 기본 OFF). v0.3.9 / Constellation v2.4.9 dashboard A2A 대화 카드 통일 + 인라인 re>summary 우선 (코디네이션 메시지 + 미분류 객체 CUSTOM 을 a2acard 로 통일). v0.3.8 / Constellation v2.4.8 dashboard EstreUF-parity 5-gap (검토사안 0뱃지 숨김 + 발신-시각 보존 + 닫은세션 영구삭제 크로스보드 동기/persist + SelectionResolved 라우팅-무관 처리 + 그룹선택 멤버탭 틴트). v0.3.7 / Constellation v2.4.7 단일 워크스페이스 멀티에이전트 session-aware routing (register-all + fail-safe; per-session CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID + .agent-sessions.json 레지스트리로 다중 세션 공유 Stop hook cursor 경쟁 해소, 미등록=SKIP-ALL) + dashboard 발급 버그 fix. v0.3.6 / Constellation v2.4.6 dashboard A2A 대화 UI 확충: 7 additive surfaces — sticky popup header + 날짜변경선 + A2A-intent CUSTOM 카드 18 intent dict + Pattern 7 TEXT_MESSAGE fallback + 첨부 칩/미리보기 모달 + SelectionPrompt chip 카드 + 닫은 세션 삭제 UI3 + self-attestation wsConfirm/wsPrompt 자체 다이얼로그), Superscalar (execution-scheduling discipline for parallel sub-agent dispatch + §3.1 Hyperbrief interlock), Hyperbrief (decision-delegation gating discipline with JSON IR + deterministic renderer + MCP server with 4 tools + PreToolUse/Stop hooks + §11.5 v1.0 readiness rubric), Greatpractice (practice-codification discipline with 3-tier macro/mezzo/micro hierarchy + 7-event lifecycle hooks + 5-axis multi-criteria maturation gate + frontmatter-driven governance SSoT — backed by 9-axis cross-domain deep research), and Ultrasafe (pre-release simulated penetration testing discipline with 8-agent parallel red-team fan-out + ≥3 iteration AND-gate clean-signal termination + 3-layer synthesis report — backed by 17-axis cross-domain deep research; v0.2.0 runtime activation cut ships 8 attacker skills + 2 hooks + MCP server with 5 tools + 5 Constellation A2A intents in advisory mode; blocking mode v0.3+ staged). Plugins are Apache-2.0 licensed; the marketplace mirrors the EG repo's main branch. Install via `/plugin marketplace add SoliEstre/EstreGenesis` then `/plugin install <name>@estregenesis-plugins`.

plugins.name: constellation
plugins.description: Live multi-agent orchestration client for Claude Code. Connects to a separately-running Constellation WebSocket server (user-provisioned; canonical reference impl at constellation/reference/runtime/server.cjs in this repo). MCP server exposes 5 tools (board_state_get / board_history_tail / agent_list_get / a2a_emit / a2a_wait_ack — tier='decided' application-tier extension included), 3 skills, and a Stop hook bundling pre-send-probe.cjs. v0.3.10 / Constellation v2.4.10 PR system §13.22 distill (RRP→정식 스펙: two-level PR + 5 wire vocab + topology + approval + state machine) + deadlock 서버 detector opt-in (§13.19.10 Q3, WS_DEADLOCK_DETECT 기본 OFF). v0.3.9 / Constellation v2.4.9 dashboard A2A 대화 카드 통일 + 인라인 re>summary 우선 (코디네이션 메시지 + 미분류 객체 CUSTOM 을 a2acard 로 통일). v0.3.8 / Constellation v2.4.8 dashboard EstreUF-parity 5-gap (검토사안 0뱃지 숨김 + 발신-시각 보존 + 닫은세션 영구삭제 크로스보드 동기/persist + SelectionResolved 라우팅-무관 처리 + 그룹선택 멤버탭 틴트). v0.3.7 / Constellation v2.4.7 단일 워크스페이스 멀티에이전트 session-aware routing (register-all + fail-safe) — 다중 세션 공유 Stop hook cursor 경쟁을 CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID + .agent-sessions.json 레지스트리로 분기 (미등록/식별불가=SKIP-ALL fail-safe, 자기 소유 inbox 만 처리). register-session.cjs (신규) + pre-send-probe routing + join-local v2.4.7 (local 워커 outbox drain + full inbound 로깅) + server.cjs WS_PRIMARY_AGENT 경고 + dashboard .ws-collab-* cursor:move leak fix. ≤5초 file Monitor 2층 기상 권장. v0.3.6 / Constellation v2.4.6 dashboard A2A 대화 UI 확충 — 7 additive surfaces: sticky popup header (스크롤 가림 방지) + 날짜변경선 sticky top:0 + A2A-intent CUSTOM 카드 (WS_A2A_INTENT 18 intent dict — Report·BlockerManifest·ReviewSLAAck·PR* 7종·Deadlock/Preempt 3종·Mediation 2종·Escalation 2종 — + summary helper + card builder + §13.16.12 Pattern 7 TEXT_MESSAGE fallback envelope 승격) + 첨부 칩/미리보기 모달 (wsAttachments/wsAttIcon/wsAttChipEl/wsAttPreview, mime별 이모지 + sha256 title + 👁/⬇) + SelectionPrompt chip 카드 #406 UI6 (issued/answered/cancelled + multiSelect + allowFreeText + SelectionAnswer/SelectionCancel emit + SelectionResolved cross-board dim) + 닫은 세션 삭제 UI3 (개별 🗑 + 전체 🗑 + 연결상태 dot + DeleteChannelHistory CUSTOM emit) + self-attestation confirm/prompt 자체 다이얼로그 (wsConfirm/wsPrompt Promise 헬퍼 — browser confirm/prompt 의존 제거로 IDE webview 환경 호환). 프로토콜 wire 변경 없음. v0.3.5 / Constellation v2.4.5 incident hardening — 4-layer guard against duplicate-agentId reconnect-loop runaway: single-instance helper (deps-0) + 4 client guards (ws-agent-client + join-local + watchdog; local-bridge retains its takeover guard) + pre-send-probe runaway protection (PROBE_RUNAWAY_BYTES 32 MiB cap + meaningful surface cap 50 + auto cursor tail-advance) + runaway-recover tool (readline streaming allowlist extraction). v0.3.4 / Constellation v2.4.4 dashboard UI augment — 4 corner-anchored position presets + drag/resize anchor normalization + legacy left/top migration + settings modal ⚙ + fab right-click context menu (center / key-issue / key-manage / settings) + folder emoji + header spacing compression. v0.3.3 / Constellation v2.4.3 ships Ultrasafe A2A-intent family integration (§13.16.9 A2A-intent allowlist + 4-group classification table A2A-intent row + new §13.16.13 wire-spec sub-section): 5 new intent names (ULTRASAFE_FINDING / ULTRASAFE_ITERATION_BOUNDARY / ULTRASAFE_RELEASE_GATE / SECURITY_DISCLOSURE_INTAKE / MPCVD_COORDINATION) + dual-mode advisory/blocking ack_tier mapping + cross-module Hyperbrief paired DECISION_REQUEST + Greatpractice candidate flow + Superscalar retire-barrier composition + board-mirror render policy per intent. Additive minor — wire compatible with v0.3.2 adopters. v0.3.0 / Constellation v2.4.0 ships KEY-MGMT (WS-PROTOCOL-KEY-MGMT.md v0.2): 5 canonical messages (KeyIssue/KeyList/KeyRevoke/KeyLabel/AgentNameChanged) + 5-state machine (ISSUED→ACTIVE→REVOKED_PENDING→REVOKED→DELETED) + key.json atomic-write persistence + 14-day TTL + main-only permission gating + immediate/sessionEnd revocation modes + UI4 발급 패널 + UI5 키 관리 모달 (목록/revoke/label rename). RegisterUpstreamKey transitional alias retained. Plus v2.3.23 dashboard reference parity (upstream invite UI + onboarding md channel guide). Without a running WS server the plugin loads cleanly and degrades gracefully. npm dep: ws ^8.18.0.

plugins.name: superscalar
plugins.description: Execution-scheduling discipline for parallel sub-agent dispatch. Wraps Superscalar.md v0.4.2 as a model-invoked skill: issue_width formula (effort_band + pace_mode + Little's Law + Kanban WIP + autonomy_available_workers) + worktree-isolated reorder buffer + cost-benefit gate (~30-60k token-horizon crossover) + opt-in speculation + adoption thresholds + n=8 dogfood ledger (Entry 05 + Entry 06 controlled A/B showing 'parallelism is not sufficient; orchestration discipline produces consistency') + v0.4.1 §3.1 Hyperbrief decision-delegation interlock (write/deploy/send lanes pass through both cost-benefit gate AND hyperbrief-trigger-check; read-only lanes exempt). 0 npm deps / 0 env.

plugins.name: hyperbrief
plugins.description: Decision-delegation gating discipline. Wraps Hyperbrief.md v0.5.6 as 3 model-invoked skills (hyperbrief-trigger-check + hyperbrief + hyperbrief-revisit) + JSON IR schema (FullBrief + BlockedStub variants) + 4 templates (MD + HTML × FullBrief + BlockedStub) + deterministic Node renderer (mini-engine.cjs with self-engineered placeholder substitution + 3-axis × 5-level tone profile + ajv schema validation) + MCP server exposing 4 tools (hyperbrief_render / hyperbrief_validate / decision_ledger_append / decision_ledger_query) + PreToolUse + Stop hooks in advise mode (4-way review-queue routing: Constellation board / standalone placeholder / setup-ask / silent). v0.5.6 adds the §5.6.7 + MUST-19 skill-side auto-localize discipline (button label + trigger phrases follow the user's prevailing conversation language; EN/KO/JA reference literals in spec). Cross-module integrations active: Constellation §13.16.9 (5 A2A intent names + ack_tier='decided') + Superscalar §3.1 (orthogonal gate at write/deploy/send lane retire). §11.5 v1.0 readiness rubric (Lens A 7-dim module-wide GA / Lens B 6-dim host-specific marketplace registration) shipped. 4 self-applied dogfood entries + adopter bundle 008. npm dep: ajv ^8.17.0.

plugins.name: greatpractice
plugins.description: Memory-triggered practice-codification discipline. Wraps Greatpractice.md v0.2.0 as 3 JSON schemas (entry-frontmatter.schema.json + hook-spec.schema.json + voice-rules.schema.json placeholder) + 1 PreToolUse contact hook (outbox-json-validate.cjs). v0.2.0 / v2.5.61 mezzo 8-batch ratification cut: release-cadence.md (macro) §2.3 의 8 mezzo decomposition candidates 를 Workflow wk5a6jh5k 병렬 fan-out 으로 한꺼번에 ratify (n-way-sync-registry / package-files-validate / bin-entry-validate / link-integrity-check / dry-run-smoke-test / pre-publish-user-gate / naming-hygiene-grep / auth-2fa-discipline). 5-axis maturation 분포 24/24/22/21/19/19/19/17. ~1850 lines added. v0.1.0 (2026-06-04 cut) 의 1 macro + 1 mezzo (outbox-json-validation) 구조에서 1 macro + 9 mezzo 로 확장 — children decomposition pattern 의 first batch demonstration. Targets the 'quiet omission' surface — small obligations that should accompany the work (update docs alongside code, check before sending, sync paired surfaces) but slip through as memory notes accumulate. agent-workspace memory feedback (memory/feedback_*.md or equivalent) is the input trigger; raw signals route through a 5-axis multi-criteria maturation gate (frequency + depth + recency + cost + predictability weighted sum, threshold ≥ 18 OR 3-criterion notability gate) into a 3-tier macro/mezzo/micro hierarchy. Ratified entries are enforced via deterministic lifecycle hooks (SessionStart blocking · UserPromptSubmit path-scoped inject · PreToolUse 3-subtype poka-yoke contact/fixed-value/motion-step · PostToolUse SSoT propagation · Stop cycle-end probe · PostCompact working-set restore). phronesis_boundary field carves out judgement-heavy work that should NOT be codified. Frontmatter is governance SSoT (9/9 cross-axis universal convergence). Backed by 9-axis cross-domain deep research (harness · humanities · psychology · management · processor · os · sre · memoization · canonical). Normative justification via Clark-Chalmers coupling condition (Distributed Cognition) + Powell-DiMaggio 3-isomorphism (Organizational Anthropology). v0.3+ roadmap: 8 mezzo entries 의 micro decomposition + manifest hash + renderers + voice linter + MESI multi-agent coherence + CMMI L4 effectiveness measurement. 0 npm deps (v0.2.0).

plugins.name: ultrasafe
plugins.description: Pre-release / pre-update simulated penetration testing discipline — v0.2.0 runtime activation cut (advisory mode). Wraps Ultrasafe.md v0.2.0 substantive spec (~3522 lines, +978 since v0.1.0) with the runtime layer: 8 attacker SKILL.md (ultrasafe-ai-llm-redteam · ultrasafe-web-api-attacker · ultrasafe-supply-chain-auditor · ultrasafe-crypto-reviewer · ultrasafe-social-engineer · ultrasafe-methodology-compliance · ultrasafe-threat-model-lifecycle · ultrasafe-synthesizer) implementing the 8-agent parallel red-team fan-out + 2 hooks (PreToolUse `ultrasafe-trigger.cjs` matcher=Bash detects publish-equivalent commands and emits ULTRASAFE_RELEASE_GATE advisory + Stop `ultrasafe-clean-signal.cjs` evaluates 4-condition AND-gate at cycle-end and emits ULTRASAFE_ITERATION_BOUNDARY) + MCP server `server.cjs` exposing 5 stdio JSON-RPC tools (ultrasafe_run_fanout · ultrasafe_finding_aggregate · ultrasafe_clean_signal_check · ultrasafe_report_generate · ultrasafe_release_gate). 5 new Constellation A2A intents integrated per Constellation v2.4.3 §13.16.13 wire-spec (ULTRASAFE_FINDING per-attacker emit + ULTRASAFE_ITERATION_BOUNDARY ≥3-iteration boundary marker + ULTRASAFE_RELEASE_GATE publish-time gate state + SECURITY_DISCLOSURE_INTAKE external disclosure entry + MPCVD_COORDINATION Multi-Party Coordinated Vulnerability Disclosure) + dual-mode advisory/blocking ack_tier mapping (advisory v0.2.x = received-tier; blocking v0.3+ = decided-tier reusing Hyperbrief application-tier ladder) + cross-module integration (Hyperbrief paired DECISION_REQUEST on severity ≥ high + Greatpractice macro/mezzo entry candidate flow for ratified findings + Superscalar retire-barrier composition at iteration boundaries). v0.2 advisory invariant: all outputs (skill recommendations / hook emissions / MCP tool returns) carry `advisory` flag — NEVER block publish in v0.2.x. Blocking mode (v0.3+) introduces user gate via paired Hyperbrief DECISION_REQUEST. 3-layer synthesis report (OSCAL Assessment Result + Hyperbrief 9-section IR + Greatpractice tree candidate) generated by synthesizer attacker. ≥3 iteration loop with 4-condition AND clean-signal gate (regression-free + monotonic finding-reduction + coverage-floor + 2 iter consecutive). Backed by 17-axis cross-domain deep research (harness · web-api-infra · ai-red-team · threat-modeling · multi-agent-distributed · adversarial-ml · fuzzing-pbt · supply-chain-sbom · devsecops-policy-as-code · incident-response-disclosure · cryptography-key-mgmt · human-factors-se-opsec · game-theory-asymmetry · compliance-standards · cognitive-decision-bias · security-visualization-dashboard · protocol-trust-evolution) — see reports/2026-06-05-ultrasafe-research/. Three architectural backbones: parallel attacker-perspective fan-out (16/17 axes cross-convergence) + cross-axis synthesis at retire-barrier (15/17 axes) + ≥3 iteration multi-condition AND clean-signal termination (14/17 axes). Tier A 5 critic patches absorbed inline (broker surface deep-dive + coverage methodology + schema evolution + regression baseline + strict-mode reconciliation). Normative grounding: Schneier asymmetry + Herley cost-asymmetry + population-level trust erosion (HTTP→HTTPS analog). npm dep: ajv ^8.17.0 (MCP server schema validation).
